name: TradingPalantir
description: Palantir-style AI command center for autonomous spot trading on BNB Smart Chain. Routes CoinMarketCap data and skill-equivalents into an evidence pipeline, scores all 128 traded tokens 1-100, arms only candidates above an adaptive market-regime quality floor (top 12), detects entries with a proprietary FVG/VWAP/multi-timeframe-EMA strategy, manages positions through adaptive trendflex ride-mode exits with R/ATR protective stops, and executes through Trust Wallet Agent Kit only after deterministic Risk Governor approval. LLMs (Claude two-pass: analyst + independent risk reviewer) classify and explain — they never execute.

competition.event: BNB HACK: AI Trading Agent Edition — CoinMarketCap x Trust Wallet

execution: Trust Wallet Agent Kit (TWAK) — self-custody, BSC mainnet

llm.pattern: two-pass: analyst proposes, independent reviewer challenges; capability-gated (can only reduce risk, never execute)
